chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5332 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.24526/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 17th April 2024 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr. Kashif Hanif, Advocate for Respondents. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner is called absent, no intimation is received. However, pursuant to the Court’s directions, Deputy Manager Legal Raja Love Kush alongwith Zonal Manager Garden Zone Mansoor Ahmed and Manager Legal Ammar Saleem Butt, has shown appearance and submits compliance report on behalf of the respondent No.2, according to which, project for pipeline replacement has been approved and executed/commissioned and gas supply has been restored in the petitioner’s area. Report is taken on record. It appears that for the aforesaid reason, petitioner is not in attendance. Accordingly, instant Constitution Petition is disposed of alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
